news.title: Ahmedabad: 20 houses, four shops demolished to widen road in Narol
news.para: Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation's estate department cleared land in Narol. Twenty residential houses and four shops were demolished. This action opened an 18-meter-wide road. Platforms and other encroachments were also removed. The corporation had issued prior notices to occupants. The demolition occurred in the presence of police after non-compliance.

news.title: Vadodara: Man cheats 16 of ₹40 lakh in PMAY flat scam
news.para: Vadodara police have registered a cheating case against Harish Chauhan, who allegedly defrauded 16 individuals by promising PMAY flats.  Chauhan, posing as a VMC agent, collected approximately Rs 40 lakh from victims before disappearing.  One complainant reported paying Rs 6.83 lakh for a promised flat in Subhanpura. The accused is currently absconding.

news.title: Karnataka eyes Japan partnership for smart city solutions in Bengaluru
news.para: Karnataka is set to collaborate with Japan on smart city initiatives in Bengaluru, aiming to leverage Japanese expertise for urban challenges. This partnership, facilitated by Japan's MLIT, will focus on areas like energy, wastewater, mobility, and disaster management, with the Greater Bengaluru Authority acting as the nodal agency.

news.title: UltraTech Cement to acquire 26.18% stake in Sunsure Solarpark for ₹19.2 crore
news.para: UltraTech Cement is going green by investing up to ₹19.2 crore in a stake of Sunsure Solarpark Seven. With this initiative, the company aims to tap into renewable energy, curbing its electricity expenses and fulfilling environmental regulations. The deal, which will be finalized with a cash infusion, is projected to be completed in 180 days.

news.title: Second phase of Indiramma housing scheme in Telangana to be launched in April
news.para: The second phase of the Indiramma housing program is set to launch in April and May, with the government aiming to construct houses in every urban ward over the next three years. A significant number of houses from the first phase are expected to be completed by June or July, with a special focus on urban areas and tribal regions.

news.title: Illegal housing units in Gurugram's Palam Vihar face sealing, water & power connections to be snapped
news.para: Authorities in Gurugram are sealing numerous illegally constructed dwelling units in Palam Vihar following a Punjab and Haryana High Court directive. The crackdown includes disconnecting essential utilities for these properties, which were found to exceed permissible construction norms and strain local infrastructure. This action aims to enforce planned development and address violations previously deemed insufficient.

news.title: Ghaziabad development body collects only 50% of revenue target
news.para: Ghaziabad Development Authority (GDA) has fallen short of its revenue targets for compounding fees in 2025-26, collecting only 50% of the projected amount. The authority also ranked among the top five underperforming districts in Uttar Pradesh for mutation policy implementation in February. This poor performance raises concerns about GDA's operational efficiency and its impact on overall earnings.

news.title: Compass dismisses lawsuit against Zillow after 'Zillow ban' ends
news.para: Compass has officially dropped its lawsuit against Zillow, which accused the online real estate giant of obstructing home listings. This settlement allows Zillow to expand its platform with more pre-market listings, empowering sellers to take charge of their property marketing strategies. Compass CEO Robert Reffkin expressed his approval of this new direction.

news.title: Over 2,700 EWS families get homes in Gurugram under CM's housing scheme
news.para: A significant milestone was achieved as 2,709 EWS families in Gurugram received flats under the Chief Minister Housing Scheme. These 200 sq ft homes, costing up to Rs 1.5 lakh, were allotted through an online lucky draw, prioritizing vulnerable groups. This initiative promises stability and dignity for many, fulfilling long-held dreams of homeownership.

news.title: Alta Capital-backed Ecobox acquires 38.5-acre in Bhiwandi, plans 1.3 million sq ft logistics park
news.para: Logicap Advisors, backed by Alta Capital, has acquired 38.5 acres in Bhiwandi to develop a 1.3 million sq ft industrial and logistics park. This expansion will boost their total portfolio to 19 million sq ft, with plans for an additional 4 million sq ft this year.

news.title: Quest Coworks acquires 57,000 sq ft office space in Mumbai's Andheri
news.para: Quest Coworks has bought over 57,000 square feet of office space in Mumbai's Andheri East. The deal with Capgemini Technology Services India was valued at Rs 55.83 crore. This acquisition highlights strong demand for ready office spaces in established business areas. Flexible workspace operators are expanding to meet hybrid work needs. The MIDC-Marol belt remains a key commercial hub.

news.title: Godrej Properties acquires 20-acre land parcel in Bengaluru
news.para: Godrej Properties has acquired a 20-acre land parcel in East Bengaluru for a premium residential project estimated to generate ₹1,350 crore in revenue. This follows their recent entry into Coimbatore with a 44-acre acquisition for a plotted residential development projected to yield ₹450 crore.

news.title: CIDCO plans to develop 126-acre industrial township in Palghar near Mumbai
news.para: CIDCO is developing a large industrial township in Palghar, aiming to create a 'Fourth Mumbai' in the Palghar-Vadhavan-Boisar belt. This initiative, anchored by the upcoming Vadhavan port, seeks to decongest the existing Mumbai core by building employment hubs and housing supply in tandem. The project signifies a synchronized approach to urban-industrial growth, mirroring Navi Mumbai's development.

news.title: Maharashtra registrations department achieves nearly 90% of revenue target
news.para: Maharashtra's registration and stamps department is nearing its annual revenue target, collecting approximately 88.4% of its Rs63,500 crore goal by March 15. Property registrations have remained robust, matching last year's volume, prompting calls from the real estate industry to maintain current ready reckoner rates. The department will also facilitate e-registrations for first-sale properties on Gudi Padwa.

news.title: Andhra Pradesh government announces 50% interest waivers on property tax dues
news.para: The state government has announced a 50% interest waiver on property tax arrears for the fiscal year 2025-26. Taxpayers can avail this benefit by paying 100% of the principal tax and the remaining 50% interest in a single installment by March 31. This initiative aims to boost municipal finances and unlock long-pending revenues, encouraging timely payments for essential public services.

news.title: HYDRAA secures 11 acres of government land in Hyderabad
news.para: Hyderabad authorities have reclaimed eleven acres of government land valued at one thousand six hundred fifty crore rupees. This action follows complaints of illegal occupation. Two acres in Kondapur designated for a public park and nine acres in Pragathi Nagar for a cremation ground and dumping yard were cleared. Fencing and signboards now mark these public spaces.

news.title: Mumbai: EOW closes ₹67.5 crore redevelopment cheating case against Kamala Mills owner
news.para: Mumbai police's economic offences wing has closed a Rs 67.50 crore cheating case against Kamala Mills owner Ramesh Govani. The EOW filed a 'B' summary report, citing insufficient evidence to substantiate the complainant's allegations. Investigations revealed a mutual cancellation of the agreement between the parties.

news.title: TCS scales up Chennai presence to 7.79 lakh sq ft with fresh OMR lease
news.para: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) has expanded its Chennai office space by 1.47 lakh sq ft at Ozone Techno Park, increasing its total footprint to approximately 7.79 lakh sq ft. This strategic move reinforces Chennai's importance as a key delivery hub for TCS, aligning with its hybrid work strategies and talent availability.
